ACTIVE.description: Agent is active and may execute commands

REGISTERED.description: Agent is registered but not yet activated

FUNDED.description: Escrow account funded, awaiting release conditions

EXPIRED.description: Proposal expired before reaching required approvals

PENDING_REVIEW.description: Proposal is under review by governance actors

ACTIVE.description: Actor is fully verified and operational

PENDING_VERIFICATION.description: Actor registered but not yet verified

EXPIRED.description: Credential has passed its expiration time

REVOKED.description: Credential has been revoked before expiration

ROTATED.description: Credential has been replaced by a new one

ACTIVE.description: Delegation is active and being used

EXPIRED.description: Delegation has passed its valid_until time

REVOKED.description: Delegation revoked by delegator or governance

ACTIVE.description: Session is live and can be used for authentication

TERMINATED.description: Session explicitly terminated by actor or system

CANCELLED.description: Intent was cancelled by actor or governance

CONVERTED_TO_COMMAND.description: Intent has been converted to an executable command

ENRICHING.description: Intent is being enriched (missing fields resolved)

READY.description: Intent is validated and ready for command conversion

VALIDATING.description: Intent is being validated against business rules

ACTIVE.description: Account is active and accepting postings

FROZEN.description: Account is frozen — no new postings allowed

CREATED.description: Entry has been created but not yet validated

POSTED.description: Entry has passed validation and been appended to the journal

RECONCILED.description: Entry has been verified against external source

REJECTED.description: Entry failed validation and was not posted

SETTLED.description: Entry has been confirmed by the originating domain

VALIDATING.description: Entry is passing through the validation pipeline

DISABLED.description: Adapter is disabled — no executions allowed

ENABLED.description: Adapter is enabled and available for execution

EXECUTING.description: Rail adapter is executing the transaction

PLANNING.description: Routing engine is evaluating available rails

PREPARING.description: Rail adapter is preparing the transaction

RECEIVED.description: Payment request has been created and is awaiting planning

RECONCILING.description: Comparing external settlement with internal records

REVERSED.description: Payment has been fully reversed through compensation

ROUTING.description: Execution plan has been created, rail selected

SETTLED.description: Payment is fully settled and receipted

COMPUTING_DECISION.description: Calculating composite decision from rule results

EVALUATING_RULES.description: Running policy rules in deterministic order

GATHERING_CONTEXT.description: Collecting identity, vault, treasury, governance context

ACTIVE.description: Rule is live and being evaluated

INACTIVE.description: Rule is disabled but not deleted

FAILED.description: Saga failed — compensation may be required

DEGRADED.description: System is operating with reduced capacity

HALTED.description: System is halted — no commands accepted

AUTHORIZED.description: Transfer has passed identity, capability, and policy gates

COMPENSATION_REQUIRED.description: A compensation saga has been initiated

EXECUTING.description: Transfer execution has begun (external payment rail engaged)

REJECTED.description: Transfer was rejected at any stage

REQUESTED.description: Transfer has been requested but not yet authorized

RESERVED.description: Vault reservation is locked for this transfer

SETTLED.description: Transfer has been confirmed as settled

UNKNOWN_EXTERNAL_STATE.description: External system returned unknown or no response

AUTHORIZED_to_RESERVED.condition: vault confirms reservation in ACTIVE state

EXECUTING_to_UNKNOWN_EXTERNAL_STATE.condition: payment rail did not respond within execution SLA

PENDING_SETTLEMENT_to_UNKNOWN_EXTERNAL_S.condition: no response received within SLA or response unparseable

UNKNOWN_EXTERNAL_STATE_to_FAILED.condition: late failure received after unknown period

AVAILABLE.description: Asset is verified and available for financial operations

CONSUMED.description: Reservation was consumed by a completed financial operation

IMPAIRED.description: Asset has suffered significant value loss

LOCKED.description: Reservation is hard-locked, awaiting consuming transaction

RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED.description: Vault state may be inconsistent with external reality
entry_actions: emit governance notification if severity >= medium

REGISTERED.description: Asset has been registered but not yet verified

REJECTED.description: Asset failed verification or was explicitly rejected

RELEASED.description: Reserved value has been returned to available pool

RESERVED.description: Portion of asset value is reserved for a pending operation

VERIFIED.description: Asset existence has been confirmed through attestation

LIQUIDATING.description: Collateral is being liquidated to cover obligation

MARGIN_CALL.description: Margin ratio has fallen below maintenance threshold

PROPOSED.description: Collateral has been proposed but not yet activated

CONSUMED.description: Reservation consumed by a completed transaction

FAILED.description: Reservation failed during creation or locking

DISBURSED.description: Value has been disbursed from vault

FUNDED.description: Funding confirmed, value available for disbursement

FUNDING_PENDING.description: Funding is in transit or being confirmed

FUNDING_REQUESTED.description: Funding has been requested from external source
